skills.name: Deploy Pavise
skills.description: Set up an upright shield to protect yourself from enemy attacks. Enemies without a target will attack the pavise instead.
skills.effect_text:
Attack CaptionRatio Blocks
Pavise Duration CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Scatter Caltrops
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per second
Targets: 6
Caltrop Duration: 10 seconds
Decreases Movement Speed by 10

skills.name: Stone Shot
skills.description: Fire Stone Bullet to one target and stacks 1 [Stone Shot: Shock] debuff for 10 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
[Stun] Chances: CaptionRatio %
[Stun] Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Rapid Fire
skills.description: When the enemy is near, pushes away the enemy to a certain distance and fires an explosive arrow at the enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Teardown
skills.description: Dismantles statues and other obstacles in front of you.
skills.effect_text:
Maximum Level: 1
Cooldown decreases according to the skill level

skills.name: Running Shot
skills.description: Increases factor and attack speed, applies as 2 consecutive hits. (Two consecutive hit effect activated when the Crossbow is equipped in the main slot)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Increases Basic Attack Speed by 10%
Duration: CaptionTime minute(s)

skills.name: Block and Shoot
skills.description: Take a defensive stance and damage the target in front.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Maximum Duration: 3 seconds
Increases Block by CaptionRatio %

attributes.name: Scatter Caltrops: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Scatter Caltrops] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Stone Shot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Stone Shot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rapid Fire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rapid Fire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Running Shot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Running Shot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Deploy Pavise: Aiming Sight
attributes.description:
* Cuts the pavise's health in half, but increases the block penetration of nearby allies by 10% and grants the caster with knockback/knockdown immunity

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Block and Shoot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases Skill Factor of [Block and Shoot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* Additional 10% increases at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Deploy Pavise: Fortress
attributes.description:
* A shield that lasts for 15 seconds is created when the caster is near the pavise

* The shield amount is 12 + [skill level] * 3% of caster's maximum HP per one Pavise (8 + [skill level] * 2% for PvP area)

* Maximum amount of silver is 50% of maximum HP (30% for PvP area)

attributes.name: [Arts] Scatter Caltrops: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Scatter Caltrops] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Stone Shot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Stone Shot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Rapid Fire: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Rapid Fire] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Teardown: Reinstall
attributes.description: * Cooldown of the according ally skill reduced when ally installation is torn down, Cooldown of the according enemy skill increased when enemy installation is torn down

attributes.name: Stone Shot: Shield Break
attributes.description:
* Shield of enemy character hit by Stone Shot is removed by 2% chance per attribute level for 5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: [Arts]Block and Shoot: Covered Shot
attributes.description:
* Decreases damage of [Block and Shoot] by 50% and accuracy by 70%

* Decreases damage received by 50%

attributes.name: [Arts] Block and Shoot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases Skill Factor of [Block and Shoot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Running Shot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Running Shot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Quarrel Shooter: Additional Damage
attributes.description: * Additional damage increases by [Physical ATK x 10% per attribute level]
